name: the-moment-of-lift
description: Melinda French Gates' The Moment of Lift — understand how empowering women changes the world through family planning, education, economic empowerment, and gender equality
useCase: Helps anyone understand the transformational power of women's empowerment — from family planning and girls' education to microfinance and global development.
knownRisks: The book reflects Melinda Gates' perspective through 2019
